name: @sadamdi/kaneo-mcp
description: MCP server for the full Kaneo API (102 tools) plus 10 documentation-grade skills: project auto-detection, render-clean markdown card templates, related-task linking, shared project context memory, grounding rules, configurable board language (global or per-project), API-key or browser OAuth auth, self-hosted support, and an interactive installer for Cursor, Claude Desktop, and Claude Code.
